sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n46760" key="h)/qhma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἤθ-ημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n46760.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">that which is sifted</tr_> or <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">strained</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dieuch.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:4:7:26" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.7.26</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
